use_cases: Hero section backgrounds for SaaS landing pages requiring immersive visual impact
Creative portfolios and entertainment sites needing animated 3D visual effects
Product showcases requiring interactive neon-style animated backgrounds
Gaming and interactive experience landing pages with WebGL-powered effects
Any web application needing customizable glowing tube animations
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered 3D neon tubes background effect using Three.js, featuring animated glowing tubes with customizable colors and click interaction support. Renders a dynamic, immersive canvas animation suitable for hero sections and decorative backgrounds.
